ab: harem kana wari pituwa tuki mu medek ku i kungkuwan.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: puwateha mi lra temakesi zi, musavak na sinsi i takakesiyan, na niyam kemakezeng na sasevangan marengay, “katikeriz! sungal!” kema marengay.
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: temakakesi mi lra, na sinsi pananadam kananta piningaiyan na aiyupan.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the Pinuyumayan language of numbers.

ab: miturus mi kana sinsi miyup, semenay mi kana senay na aiyupan.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.
I have learned many Pinuyumayan languages.

ab: kana wariwari ziya mukakuwa ku i kungkuwan, kana wariwari ziya mu menadanadam ku kananta piningaiyan, rarengay ku pakinger kani ina.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the Pinuyumayan language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
